description: Enterprise techniques used by IronWind, ATT&CK software S9029 (v1.0)
name: IronWind (S9029)

techniques.comment: [IronWind](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9029) can used HTTP to send information to C2 about the targeted system.(Citation: Check Point Wirte NOV 2024)
[IronWind](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9029) has used the Windows command shell to execute malicious files.(Citation: Check Point Wirte NOV 2024)
[IronWind](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9029) can deobfuscate the next stage payload using Base64 and XOR operations with the key "53".(Citation: Check Point Wirte NOV 2024)
[IronWind](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9029) has used DLL sideloading for execution.(Citation: Check Point Wirte NOV 2024)
[IronWind](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9029) has used a .NET DLL named "exit-DN4-core.dll" to terminate malicious processes running on victim's systems.(Citation: Check Point Wirte NOV 2024)
[IronWind](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9029) has used Base64 encoding and XOR encryption with the key “53” to obfuscate command strings.(Citation: Check Point Wirte NOV 2024)
[IronWind](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9029) can list installed software on targeted hosts.(Citation: Check Point Wirte NOV 2024)
[IronWind](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9029) can capture the OS version and computer name of the compromised host.(Citation: Check Point Wirte NOV 2024)
[IronWind](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9029) can enumerate the username on victim's systems.(Citation: Check Point Wirte NOV 2024)
